subject: Your voicemail is funding your competitors
body:
THE LEAK: Chew Plumbing Wellington KS no website backlogged techs showing up without right parts price shoppers wasting phone time bad reviews is leaving money on the table. Missed calls cost ~$180 each.
PROOF OF LIFE: ServiceTitan $1.2B acquisition (2022), Avoca $125M
THE FIX: AI intake captures, qualifies, and schedules inbound inquiries before human touch.
THE CATCH: If staff don't check the dashboard, this is a $249/month ornament.
THE REVERSAL: They already don't check voicemail. This is faster.
THE ASK: 15-minute call. Tuesday or Thursday. Pick one, I'll bring numbers.
THE HOOK: Your voicemail is funding your competitors
cta: 15-minute call. Tuesday or Thursday. Pick one, I'll bring numbers.
